name: Telecommunications Business Act
owner: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications, Japan (MIC)
description: Act No. 86 of 1984. Full text acquired covers Chapter I General Provisions (incl. Art. 4 secrecy-of-communications guarantee) through Chapter on Universal Telecommunications Service Support, ~130 pages / full article structure.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/regulation/soumu.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Primary legislation -- excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13, same basis as APPI and the My Number Act.

current_extraction.notes: MIC's own alternate English PDF (not the blocked japaneselawtranslation.go.jp copy) fetched and extracted cleanly. CAVEAT: this translation's own header states "Latest revision: Act No. 136 of December 28, 2007" -- the Act has been heavily amended since (research flagged 2022/2023 cookie-consent-style amendments), so this text is an OLDER revision, not current law. Useful for structure/baseline text but article numbering and content may have since changed.

scope.notes: Full text acquired, but of an outdated (2007) revision. Current-revision re-acquisition still needed.
